base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of weapons_atlas — a pickup_item from 1987 final fantasy. Weapon icons grid — swords/axes/hammers/staves/bows/knives for shop/inventory (~30 weapon types in FF1). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Weapon icons grid — swords/axes/hammers/staves/bows/knives for shop/inventory (~30 weapon types in FF1)
